items.title: 'Superhuman' managers shouldn't have to ask for help - Beard's family on loss
items.summary: The family of former WSL manager Matt Beard tell BBC Sport about the emotional burden of football management, and the changes they want to see.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Can SRH's power-hitters flip the script against red-hot GT?
items.summary: SRH arrive with momentum in their batting unit but must overcome a poor record against GT in Ahmedabad, as both teams eye No. 1 spot
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Dos A Cero! USA's Triumph Over Mexico Makes World Cup Top Moments
items.summary: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
